candidate.note: The package version intentionally remains 0.5.1 until the 0.6.0 gate opens.

auth.result: 15m minimum-validity passed; 3h window refused; refresh reused helper cache and truthfully reported expiryAdvanced=false; post-status remained valid.

skills.result: Missing-tool refusal, isolated bootstrap, f040 discovery, fixed first-party install, list, info, and read all retained.

siteCreate.result: The public disposable GitHub repo was created, but Configuration Service registration was refused with 403. f041 corrected unrelated-cwd fstab contamination; replay now reports the site as unconfigured.
siteCreate.requiredGrant: AEM Configuration Service config:write for org somarc
siteCreate.recovery: da --org somarc --repo da-cli-wave6-site-create --commit site register --code-owner somarc --code-repo da-cli-wave6-site-create --da-org somarc
siteCreate.retention: Retain unmodified through the 0.6.0 verification window; archive or delete through an authorized operator afterward.

codeSidekick.result: Direct GET succeeded on the certification site. Disposable mutation exposed f042: the canonical Sidekick endpoint is GET-only, so the unsupported set command was removed.

commerce.result: Fixture scaffold/inspect and Product Bus plan/dry-run passed; committed ingest is conditioned on approved Product Bus tenancy, credential, and cleanup authority.

stardust.result: Version check, extract, direct, prototype, and migrate dry-run passed locally; committed migration requires a registered disposable DA target, human design approval, and cleanup authority.

remainingGate.detail: Grant config:write for somarc, run the recorded site register recovery, author minimal DA content through da-cli, preview and verify the disposable site, then update the DA-backed Wave 6/test-plan pages and stamp the wave cut.
